name: pr-reconciler
description: Detects open PRs whose HEAD is already on main (no-op candidates) and long-idle PRs.

name: worktree-janitor
description: Detects git worktrees whose branch was deleted or merged upstream.

name: trdd-drift
description: Detects TRDD documents marked 'In progress' whose files have not been touched for a long time.

name: trdd-reminder
description: Periodic consolidated reminder of all TRDDs currently 'In progress'.

name: task-pr-mismatch
description: Detects session tasks whose status disagrees with the referenced PR state.

name: rate-limit-retry
description: Emits a resume prompt every 2 minutes while the StopFailure flag is set.

name: cache-keepalive
description: Emits a keep-alive nudge when the session has been idle for longer than the prompt-cache TTL.
